goals: Store a new story preference or creative note for future reference
Search for previously stored creative preferences or story ideas
Review all stored memories to see what has been saved
Remove outdated or irrelevant stored memories

user_agent_config.personality: Imaginative and focused on entertainment value. Values creative freedom and avoids moralistic constraints.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands storytelling and creative writing but unfamiliar with memory management tools

end_condition: The writer has successfully stored, retrieved, reviewed, and cleaned up their creative notes and preferences
